name: Magic Cookie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the cracker crumbs, sugar, and butter into a 13-inch x 9-inch x 2-inch pan.
2. Mix thoroughly.
3. With the back of a spoon, press the mixture evenly and firmly in the bottom of the pan to form a crust.
4. Sprinkle walnuts evenly over the crust.
5. Scatter chips over the nuts.
6. Sprinkle coconut over the chips.
7. Pour condensed milk evenly over the coconut.
8. Bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees) for 25 minutes or until lightly browned around the edges.
9. Cool.
10. Cut into bars.
